purpose: Define the Final Product Completion Gate from Section 8 as a non-weakening machine/manual contract for Launch L0 G1 evidence.

law_firm_os_weighted_implementation_ledg.total_rule: count implementation subphases from the ledger at validation time

hrx_embedded_people_weighted_implementat.total_rule: count HRX implementation subphases from the ledger at validation time

ledger_inputs.expanded_total_rule: derive by summing the Law Firm OS weighted ledger total and the HRX embedded People ledger total at validation time

scope_revision_input.approval_rule: validator loads this path from the contract and treats a missing or unapproved record as fail-closed

completion_items.section_8_source: CP00-147 through the final generated closeout pack completed or regenerated with explicit correction policy.
completion_items.pass_rule: closeout plan and next-pack queue report closeout_complete=true with zero pending packs, and the live latest pack has production_ready manifest evidence.
the Law Firm OS unit count is derived from the weighted implementation ledger and reported without hardcoded totals.

completion_items.section_8_source: HRX embedded People/HR Evidence units tracked.
completion_items.pass_rule: the HRX embedded People unit count is derived from the HRX weighted ledger and reconciled to the HRX contract projection.
expanded total is derived from source ledger counts at runtime, not stored as a literal in this contract.
LDIP source classification coverage is complete or every exception is explicitly deferred or rejected with owner and target.

completion_items.section_8_source: LDIP entities, table fields, agents, tools, clean room types, UI surfaces, APIs, events, NFRs, metrics, tests, priority items, and risks all mapped or explicitly deferred/rejected.
completion_items.pass_rule: each LDIP category has mapped, explicitly deferred, or explicitly rejected disposition with no unclassified category rows.

completion_items.section_8_source: Every affected pack passes implementation, tests, Hermes evidence, review evidence or explicit owner waiver, adjudication, construction inspection, production_ready included units, final validation, and commit.
completion_items.pass_rule: pack manifests and evidence files satisfy the closeout-pack validator, and any review waiver remains explicitly marked as not counted as review evidence.
no pack or launch goal evidence contains unresolved P0 or P1 findings.

completion_items.section_8_source: P2 findings fixed or explicitly deferred.
completion_items.pass_rule: all P2 findings are fixed or deferred with owner, target phase or pack, and rationale.

completion_items.section_8_source: HRX remains embedded inside Law Firm OS.
completion_items.pass_rule: HRX contract and projection keep hrx_embedded=true and separate_product=false.

completion_items.section_8_source: LDIP remains internal Legal Data Intelligence capability inside Law Firm OS.
completion_items.pass_rule: human reviewer confirms LDIP is positioned as internal capability only, with no separate-product or external launch claim.

completion_items.section_8_source: Matter-first, permission-first, audit-first, evidence-bound AI, human review, read-only default, external-share safety, and vendor-neutral architecture all pass.
completion_items.pass_rule: human reviewer signs the architecture invariant checklist and records any exception as a blocking launch finding.

completion_items.section_8_source: Final SaaS-grade product candidate gate passes.
completion_items.pass_rule: designated human approver signs the final SaaS-grade product candidate checklist after machine items pass.
